title: lithocarpus brachystachyus
intro: Lithocarpus brachystachyus, also known as the small-leaved bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Its leaves and bark are rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Lithocarpus brachystachyus is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in water, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
